bead.title: agent: enforce execution cwd and evidence-path contracts
bead.description:
PROBLEM
During dogfood of ddx-3b721804 on 2026-06-13, the execute-bead attempt ran a Go verification command from the wrong directory and got `go: go.mod file not found in current directory`, then later attempted to inspect `.ddx/executions/` from the wrong location and got `No such file or directory`. The same attempt temporarily moved new source files through `/tmp` while debugging. DDx instructions already say to work inside the execution worktree and keep evidence under the bundle path, but instructions alone did not prevent wrong-cwd verification or `/tmp` round-trips.

ROOT CAUSE WITH FILE:LINE
cli/internal/agent/execute_bead.go:1925-1934 defines the no_changes rationale path in prose but does not make evidence-path checks mechanical for ordinary verification commands.
cli/internal/agent/execute_bead.go:1936-1941 says reports must go under the bundle path and never `/tmp`, but DDx does not reject transcript/tool activity that uses `/tmp` as an implementation or evidence staging area.
cli/internal/agent/execute_bead.go:1961-1967 says work only inside the execution worktree, but DDx does not validate that shell commands affecting verification ran from the repo/module root or execution worktree.
cli/internal/agent/execute_bead_validation.go:147-161 validates commit/gate integrity after the attempt, but it skips checks it cannot observe and does not classify wrong-cwd verification or `/tmp` file round-trips as attempt-integrity defects.

PROPOSED FIX
Add structured transcript/session validation for execute-bead attempts that detects verification commands run from the wrong cwd, evidence-path lookups outside the execution bundle, and source/evidence file moves through `/tmp`. When detected, preserve the attempt or require repair before closure with a typed integrity reason and durable evidence.

NON-SCOPE
Do not ban temporary compiler caches or harmless OS temp usage by build tools. Do not parse arbitrary shell perfectly; target high-signal patterns DDx can observe from tool command arguments, cwd, and output.
bead.acceptance:
1. TestAttemptIntegrityRejectsVerificationWrongCWD feeds a transcript/tool record where a required Go verification command returns `go.mod file not found`; DDx classifies it as wrong_cwd_verification and does not accept it as passing evidence.
2. TestAttemptIntegrityRejectsMissingExecutionBundleLookup feeds a command/output pair that tries `.ddx/executions/` from the wrong cwd and records evidence_path_wrong_cwd.
3. TestAttemptIntegrityRejectsTmpRoundTripForSourceFiles feeds transcript commands that move tracked source/test files through `/tmp`; DDx records tmp_roundtrip_tracked_file and preserves or rejects the attempt.
4. TestAttemptIntegrityAllowsBenignBuildToolTempUsage proves build cache/temp paths not moving repo source or evidence are not rejected.
5. cd cli && go test ./internal/agent/... -run 'TestAttemptIntegrityRejectsVerificationWrongCWD|TestAttemptIntegrityRejectsMissingExecutionBundleLookup|TestAttemptIntegrityRejectsTmpRoundTripForSourceFiles|TestAttemptIntegrityAllowsBenignBuildToolTempUsage' passes.\n6. lefthook run pre-commit passes.
